findings.title: matter_refs required_when policy is declarative-only
findings.evidence: ProductContract model records six data-touch triggers in matterReferencePolicy.requiredWhen, while validateProductContract does not yet receive a data-touch context field. This is consistent with M01 nullable Matter-reference scope and no real matter data is used.
findings.recommendation: Record as declarative until a later ProductContract context/call-path subphase introduces data-touch context, then enforce required_when.

findings.title: shared synthetic fixture provenance still names the M00 layout origin
findings.evidence: synthetic-control-plane.json keeps subphase_id RP00.P01.M00.S01 while now carrying the M01 ProductContract record.
findings.recommendation: Record as non-blocking provenance debt and refresh provenance when the fixture is next extended.

parsed_review.review_notes: ProductContract model binding is correct for RP00.P01.M01.S01/RP00.P01.M01; stable pc_ identifiers, tenant scope, status lifecycle, nullable matter_refs, audit_event_ref, created_at, and updated_at are enforced and tested. Synthetic fixture remains no-real-data/no-write. Other entities remain future. Weighted-ledger generic title/deliverable_type/UI gate defer is auditable and not hand-edited. Closeout gating for actual Claude metadata, construction inspection, and next boundary RP00.P01.M02.S01 is intact. No P0/P1/P2 findings remain.
